name: Golden Spoon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly grease a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
2. Place the grated cheddar in a small bowl and set aside.
3. Scald the milk in the top of a double boiler.
4. Beat the egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored, then set them aside.
5. When the milk is scalded, add the cornmeal gradually, stirring constantly.
6. Stir until the mixture thickens and becomes smooth.
7. Remove the top of the double boiler from the simmering water and gradually add the beaten egg yolks, stirring constantly.
8. Mix in the grated cheese, butter, sugar, and salt.
9. Beat the egg whites until rounded peaks are formed.
10. Gently spread the beaten egg whites over the cornmeal mixture.
11. Carefully fold together until just blended.
12. Turn the mixture into the greased casserole dish.
13. Bake at 375 degrees F. for 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick or cake tester comes out clean when inserted in the center of the dish.
14. Serve piping hot with butter and maple syrup or honey.
